  • CPN - Finding

HL7 PT FHIR Implementation Guide: Terminologias, publicado por HL7 Portugal. Este guia não é uma publicação autorizada; é a compilação contínua para a versão 1.0.0 construída pela FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. Esta versão é baseada no conteúdo atual de https://github.com/hl7-pt/terminologias/tree/master e muda regularmente. Veja o Diretório de versões publicadas
Built from commit 987016b6.

    <div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"><p class="res-header-id"><b>Narrativa gerada: ValueSet cpn-finding-vs</b></p><a name="cpn-finding-vs"> </a><a name="hccpn-finding-vs"> </a><ul><li>Include estes códigos, tal como definidos em <a href="http://www.snomed.org/"><code>http://snomed.info/sct</code></a><span title="Version is not explicitly stated. intestinal anormal</td><td>Abnormal intestinal absorption (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal intestinal absorption (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a frequently (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/225526009">225526009</a></td><td>Padrão de refeições irregular</td><td>Eats irregularly (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Eats irregularly (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/289141003">289141003</a></td><td>Padrão de refeições regular</td><td>Eats regularly (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Eats regularly (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/247554008">247554008</a></td><td>Pelos tipo &quot;saca-rolhas&quot;</td><td>Kinked hairs (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Kinked hairs (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/839581000000101">839581000000101</a></td><td>Percentagem da gordura visceral corporal</td><td>Visceral fat percentage of total body composition (finding)</td><td>Percentagem de gordura visceral</td><td>Visceral fat percentage of total body composition (finding)</td><td>Percentagem de gordura visceral</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/1153605006">1153605006</a></td><td>Percentil da estatura para a idade</td><td>Body height for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Body height for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/1153602009">1153602009</a></td><td>Percentil do IMC para a idade</td><td>Body mass index for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Body mass index for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/1153592008">1153592008</a></td><td>Percentil do peso para a idade</td><td>Weigth for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Weigth for age percentile (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/79890006">79890006</a></td><td>Perda de apetite</td><td>Loss of appetite (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Loss of appetite (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/719227004">719227004</a></td><td>Perda de gordura subcutânea (torax)</td><td>Loss of subcutaneous fat overlying rib (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Loss of subcutaneous fat overlying rib (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/719229001">719229001</a></td><td>Perda de gordura subcutânea (tríceps)</td><td>Loss of subcutaneous fat overlying triceps muscle (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Loss of subcutaneous fat overlying triceps muscle (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/816172003">816172003</a></td><td>Perda de peso gestacional avaliado</td><td>Measured gestational weight loss (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Measured gestational weight loss (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/448765001">448765001</a></td><td>Perda de peso não intencional</td><td>Unintentional weight loss (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Unintentional weight loss (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440381000124102">440381000124102</a></td><td>Perfusão de nutrição entérica excessiva</td><td>Excessive enteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>Aporte entérico excessivo</td><td>Excessive enteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>Aporte entérico excessivo</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440361000124107">440361000124107</a></td><td>Perfusão de nutrição entérica insuficiente</td><td>Inadequate enteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>Aporte entérico insuficiente</td><td>Inadequate enteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>Aporte entérico insuficiente</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/926365009">926365009</a></td><td>Perfusão de nutrição parentérica</td><td>Parenteral nutrition infusion finding (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Parenteral nutrition infusion finding (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Excessive parenteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440371000124100">440371000124100</a></td><td>Perfusão de nutrição parentérica insuficiente</td><td>Inadequate parenteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Inadequate parenteral nutrition infusion (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a circumference (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Hip circumference (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/413157003">413157003</a></td><td>Perímetro geminal direito</td><td>Right calf circumference (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Right calf circumference (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a body weight (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Usual body weight (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/170804003">170804003</a></td><td>Peso ideal</td><td>Ideal body weight (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Ideal body weight (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Triceps skin fold thickness (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/23154005">23154005</a></td><td>Pressão arterial diastólica href="http://snomed.info/id/18050000">18050000</a></td><td>Pressão arterial sistólica elevada</td><td>Increased systolic arterial pressure (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Increased systolic arterial pressure (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440341000124108">440341000124108</a></td><td>Previsão de excessiva ingestão energética</td><td>Predicted excessive energy nutrientes excessiva</td><td>Predicted excessive nutrient intake (finding)</td><td>Previsão de ingestão excessiva de nutrientes</td><td>Predicted excessive nutrient intake (finding)</td><td>Previsão de ingestão excessiva de nutrientes</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/700361001">700361001</a></td><td>Previsão de ingestão de nutrientes insuficiente</td><td>Predicted inadequate nutrient intake (finding)</td><td>Previsão de ingestão insuficiente de nutrientes</td><td>Predicted inadequate nutrient intake (finding)</td><td>Previsão de ingestão insuficiente de nutrientes</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440331000124103">440331000124103</a></td><td>Previsão de insuficiente Ingestão energética</td><td>Predicted inadequate energy intake anormal</td><td>Abnormal prominence of clavicle (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal prominence of clavicle (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/719226008">719226008</a></td><td>Proeminência do acrómio anormal</td><td>Abnormal prominence of acromion (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal prominence of acromion (finding</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal prominence of patella (finding</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/719198009">719198009</a></td><td>Promeniência da omoplata anormal</td><td>Abnormal prominence of scapula (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal prominence of scapula (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/844582002">844582002</a></td><td>Qualidade de vida comprometida</td><td>Impaired quality of life (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Impaired quality of life (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/248367009">248367009</a></td><td>Razão cintura/anca</td><td>Waist/hip ratio (observable entity)</td><td>-</td><td>Waist/hip ratio (observable entity)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/845541000000105">845541000000105</a></td><td>Razão cintura/estatura</td><td>Waist to height ratio (observable entity)</td><td>Razão perímetro de cintura/estatura</td><td>Waist to height ratio (observable entity)</td><td>Razão perímetro de cintura/estatura</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/288990008">288990008</a></td><td>Recém-nascido capaz de efetuar uma boa pega para amamentação</td><td>Does latch on to breast for feeding (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Does latch on to breast for feeding (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/288989004">288989004</a></td><td>Recém-nascido não capaz de efetuar uma boa pega para amamentação</td><td>Unable to latch on to breast for feeding (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Unable to latch on to breast for feeding (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/105481005">105481005</a></td><td>Recusa alimentar</td><td>Refusing food (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Refusing food (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/706908007">706908007</a></td><td>Regressão face ao objetivo da intervenção nutricional</td><td>Some digression away from goal (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Some digression away from goal (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/309158009">309158009</a></td><td>Resultado laboratorial anormal</td><td>Laboratory finding abnormal (navigational concept)</td><td>-</td><td>Laboratory finding abnormal (navigational concept)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/129845004">129845004</a></td><td>Risco de desequilíbrio nutricional por ingestão abaixo das necessidades nutricionais</td><td>At risk for imbalanced nutrition, less than body requirements (finding)</td><td>Em risco de desequilíbrio nutricional, inferior às necessidades</td><td>At risk for imbalanced nutrition, less than body requirements (finding)</td><td>Em risco de desequilíbrio nutricional, inferior às necessidades</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/445391000124109">445391000124109</a></td><td>Risco de interação fármaco-alimento</td><td>At risk of drug interaction with food (finding)</td><td>Interação alimento-medicamento prevista</td><td>At risk of drug interaction with food (finding)</td><td>Interação alimento-medicamento prevista</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/249475006">249475006</a></td><td>Sede</td><td>Thirst symptom (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Thirst symptom (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/288977001">288977001</a></td><td>Sem capacidade de sucção</td><td>Unable to suck (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Unable to suck (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/161845002">161845002</a></td><td>Sem ingestão de líquidos</td><td>Not taking fluids (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Not taking fluids (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/251379005">251379005</a></td><td>Sintomas gastrointestinais</td><td>Gastrointestinal sensation altered (finding)</td><td>Alteração da perceção da sintomatologia do trato gastrointestinal</td><td>Gastrointestinal sensation altered (finding)</td><td>Alteração da perceção da sintomatologia do trato gastrointestinal</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440311000124109">440311000124109</a></td><td>Taxa de crescimento excessiva</td><td>Excessive growth rate (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Excessive growth rate (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/440301000124106">440301000124106</a></td><td>Taxa de crescimento inadequada</td><td>Below expected growth rate (finding)</td><td>Atraso de crescimento</td><td>Below expected growth rate (finding)</td><td>Atraso de crescimento</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/166848004">166848004</a></td><td>Triglicerídeos elevados</td><td>Serum triglycerides raised (finding)</td><td>Hipertrigliceridemia</td><td>Serum triglycerides raised (finding)</td><td>Hipertrigliceridemia</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/425244000">425244000</a></td><td>Turgor da pele diminuído</td><td>Decreased skin turgor (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Decreased skin turgor (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/698859001">698859001</a></td><td>Utilização de nutrientes prejudicada</td><td>Impaired nutrient utilization (finding)</td><td>Alteração na utilização de nutrientes</td><td>Impaired nutrient utilization (finding)</td><td>Alteração na utilização de nutrientes</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/442618008">442618008</a></td><td>Valores bioquímicos relacionados com o estado nutricional alterados</td><td>Abnormal finding on evaluation procedure (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Abnormal finding on evaluation procedure (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/267111003">267111003</a></td><td>Vegan ou vegetariano estrito</td><td>Vegan or strict vegetarian (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Vegan or strict vegetarian (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/24930006">24930006</a></td><td>Vegana</td><td>Vegan (finding)</td><td>Vegano</td><td>Vegan (finding)</td><td>Vegano</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/300928006">300928006</a></td><td>Vegetariano</td><td>Vegetarian (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Vegetarian (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr><tr><td><a href="http://snomed.info/id/425512003">425512003</a></td><td>Xerose corneal</td><td>Dry cornea (finding)</td><td>-</td><td>Dry cornea (finding)</td><td>-</td></tr></table></li></ul></div>
